Actions.Text: REFERRED TO CORPORATIONS, AUTHORITIES AND COMMISSIONS

Title: Authorizes the Lawrence-Cedarhurst fire department to enter into certain leases with the Nassau county bridge authority
Summary: Authorizes the Lawrence-Cedarhurst fire department to enter into certain leases with the Nassau county bridge authority in order to build facilities to store fire department apparatus and for training.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the public authorities law, in relation to authorizing the Lawrence-Cedarhurst fire department to enter into a long term lease with the Nassau county bridge authority
